entity: LeBron James is the NBA all-time regular-season points leader as of 2025-26 (passed Kareem in Feb 2023).
notes: Computed from fact_player_career (NBA, Regular Season) — not from agg_all_time_leaders, whose totals are inflated/incorrect vs BBR (data-quality-audit.md). Warehouse total for LeBron (43,440) is in the BBR neighborhood; BBR-citable career total through 2024-25 is 42,184+ (BBR updates live). The stat_rank=1 assertion pins LeBron's #1 all-time position regardless of the running total.
